---

##    The God Momentum Challenge 2026: "The Year Of The 'Fire Horse'" 

If 2026 feels like the year where your art career NEEDS to take off...  


And you’re sick of telling yourself “it’s time”, but not acting on it…  


 _Then you’re gonna love what I have in store for you..._

  


#  **The God Momentum Challenge 2026**  


_40 Days and 40 Nights Of Hardcore Artistic Discipline_

January 19 (Day Zero) - February 28 (Day 40)

![](https://uploads.teachablecdn.com/attachments/af179cb889204d5b949c87966e9098a7.jpeg)  


### It’s kinda like “Winter Arc” or “75 Hard”, but made especially for artists. Designed to reclaim your artistic brain.

### Here’s what we’ll be focusing on:  


### 1\. Trifecta (exercise, nutrition, sleep)  


### 2\. Getting you OFF your phone  


### 3\. Planting daily seeds for your career that will sprout in the spring (aka what Andy Warhol used to call “Business Art”)  


### 4\. Making art every. single. day.  
  


_What will you end up with at the end of these transformational 40 DAYS?_  


### A new body. Cured from social media addiction. Solid foundations in place for your career. AND TONS OF FUCKING NEW ART!

And in true Father Bronques fashion, we’ll be doing all of this in a way that’s creative AND fun. Remember fun?

You may not know this but... I’ve been doing this by myself since the beginning of my career. But last year was the first time I tried it as a group. Artists only. And, sorry for the hype, but it’s true… “It changed lives.” I saw better results than all my previous years of helping creatives in The Mystery School.  


**Probably the only thing that’s missing for you to finally maintain the CONSISTENCY you crave is some accountability. And to be surrounded by people who are doing the same thing. God Momentum will provide those 2 things for you: community and accountability... The insurance policy that will get you through the inevitable tough days.**  


God Momentum will also provide you with much-needed structure for your discipline. No more leaving things up to chance. Your art is too important for that.  


[Join The mystery school BEFORE ](https://learn.makeartnotcontent.com/p/enroll)January 11 (yes, you need AT LEAST one week preparation before DAY 0 (the 19th) of the Challenge).

Once you’re in, email me right away, and I’ll give you all the details.  
  
[Let’s begin your “upward spiral”.](https://learn.makeartnotcontent.com/p/enroll)  


(If you’re ALREADY in The Mystery School, you should already have an email about God Momentum in your inbox since last Sunday.)  


P.S. What makes this year, 2026, so special is that it’s also the Chinese zodiac’s year of the “Fire Horse” (a rare occurrence happening only once every 60 years). We’ll be channeling that transformational energy of passion, bold action, and significant change into your art. The stars are LITERALLY aligned for breaking old patterns! Use this wind on your back to finally make things happen for yourself.  


[ Complete and Continue   ]()
